candidate_problem_record.subject: Physics
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: When a system is taken from state a to state b along the path acb shown in the figure below, 70 J of heat flows into the system, and the system does 30 J of work. When the system is returned from state b to state a along the curved path shown, 60 J of heat flows out of the system. Does the system perform work on its surroundings or do the surroundings perform work on the system? How much work is done?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh: 一个系统从状态 A 经过循环路径 ACB 返回到状态 A。沿路径 AC 吸收热量 $70\ \mathrm{J}$,做功 $30\ \mathrm{J}$;沿路径 CB 放出热量 $60\ \mathrm{J}$。请判断该系统对环境做功还是环境对系统做功?并计算该循环过程中系统对环境的净做功。
metadata.explanation_zh: 首先,计算 $\Delta U_{acb}$。根据题目给出的路径 $acb$,有 $Q = +70\, \mathrm{J}$ 和 $W = -30\, \mathrm{J}$ ($W$ 为负值,因为是系统做功)。根据第一定律 $\Delta U = Q + W$,可得 $\Delta U_{acb} = +40\, \mathrm{J}$。由于 $\Delta U_{a \rightarrow b}$ 与路径无关,因此必有 $\Delta U_{ab} = +40\, \mathrm{J}$,且 $\Delta U_{ba} = -\Delta U_{ab} = -40\, \mathrm{J}$。因此,对于从 $b$ 到 $a$ 的曲线路径,有 $-40\, \mathrm{J} = Q_{ba} + W_{ba}$,其中 $Q_{ba} = -60\, \mathrm{J}$,可推导出 $W_{ba} = +20\, \mathrm{J}$。所以,外界对系统做了 $20\, \mathrm{J}$ 的功。

The PV diagram is clear and consistent, but it is mainly contextual rather than necessary.
